patch.value: During a 3d-bots audit, pm update --allow-audit-update --comment/--file/--doc was rejected as restricted, forcing separate pm comments/files/docs calls. These are append-only non-lifecycle additions that match the audit-update intent. Permit them under --allow-audit-update (keep lifecycle/destructive flags restricted).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: DEFERRED (design tension): GH-207 was already deliberately addressed (code comment 'GH-207' in update.ts) — append-style --comment/--file/--doc are intentionally routed through dedicated commands (pm comments --allow-audit-comment, pm files --force) with exact retry guidance in the audit-scope error. Reversing that to permit inline non-owner appends under --allow-audit-update changes a documented decision and the audit-scope security story. Keeping restricted; the retry guidance already gives a one-paste path. Revisit only with explicit maintainer sign-off.

author: codex-implementation
message: Start GH-207 implementation: allow audit update evidence appends while keeping lifecycle and unsafe append fields restricted

value.note: Regression coverage for GH-207 audit evidence appends

value.author: codex-implementation
value.text: Evidence update: focused unit test passed (95 tests); build/contracts/docs-links/changelog/security checks passed; temp-dir smoke verified non-owner --allow-audit-update appends comment/file/doc and still rejects --test; dependency sweep found commander 15 latest but skipped because it requires Node >=22.12 while package engines remain >=20; Auto Release push-race failure maps to closed pm-5oti and current main has retry/rebase helper with latest manual Auto Release green.

value.author: codex-implementation
value.text: Coverage follow-up: first full coverage run failed only because the removed --comment restriction left replacement-map branches for --file/--doc uncovered in update.ts; added focused helper assertions for those replacement commands and rerunning focused tests plus coverage.

value.author: codex-implementation
value.text: Final local verification: focused update suite passed (95 tests); full coverage passed 228 files / 4609 tests with 100% statements, branches, functions, and lines; typecheck, static quality, docs-skills, docs-links, version check, contracts check, changelog check, security scan, audit, package doctor, telemetry status, Sentry 24h unresolved query, and temp-dir GH-207 smoke passed or were clean. Existing validate resolution warnings are backlog-wide and history drift is ok.

patch.value: Allowed non-owner audit evidence appends through pm update --allow-audit-update for comments, files, and docs only.
Agents can append audit comments and linked file/doc evidence in one audited update without claiming another owner's item, while unsafe mutation classes stay blocked.
Focused and full coverage regression tests verify allowed evidence appends plus blocked unsafe audit-update fields; temp project smoke confirmed CLI behavior.

Implemented GH-207 audit evidence appends: --allow-audit-update now permits append-only --comment/--file/--doc evidence while lifecycle, dependency, test, note, learning, reminder/event, and clear/replace mutations remain restricted; tests, docs, coverage, temp smoke, dependency/security, Sentry, telemetry, and release-health checks completed.
